sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime, year_month UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_date, year_month) VALUES (now(), toYYYYMM(now()));
UPDATE test_dates SET year_month = toYYYYMM(event_date) WHERE year_month < 202301;
SELECT event_date, toYYYYMM(event_date, 'UTC') AS ym FROM test_dates WHERE year_month = 202209;
SELECT DISTINCT toYYYYMM(event_date, 'Europe/London') AS ym FROM test_dates;
